summary_en: 1,050,000 shares (2.12% of shares outstanding) acquired for ¥2.68B via ToSTNeT-3 on 2026-05-15. Authorized limit was 1,155,000 shares (2.33% S/O) for up to ¥2.95B. Program concluded.
title_en: Notice of Completion of Acquisition of Treasury Shares via Off-Floor Self-Share Trading (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief: On 2026-05-15, Topre Corporation completed its acquisition of 1,050,000 treasury shares (2.12% of shares outstanding) for ¥2.68 billion using off-floor trading (ToSTNeT-3) on the Tokyo Stock Exchange. The acquisition was authorized by board resolution on 2026-05-14 with an upper limit of 1,155,000 shares (2.33% S/O) and ¥2.95 billion. The company executed 1,050,000 shares for ¥2.68 billion, staying within the authorized limits. The buyback program has now concluded. The stated rationale was to improve capital efficiency and enable flexible capital allocation in response to changing business conditions.
